boundary_notes: Allowed claim is governance/pipeline-only, not biological validation.
Lineage description is allowed only as artifact history, not execution.
Zero counters support safety-boundary claims, not scientific validation.
Claim classification is not readiness approval.
No current artifact applies manuscript patches.
These evidence types remain zero in the current lineage.
Internal consistency is not empirical performance.
Real-biological operational claims are outside the allowed scope.
Current readiness approval and manuscript submission readiness remain zero.

claim_items.blocked_language: We validate a biological model, prove real-world performance, or establish manuscript readiness.
claim_items.boundary_note: Allowed claim is governance/pipeline-only, not biological validation.
claim_items.claim_boundary: Allowed: the project may claim an internally audited, safety-bounded, safe abstract toy-only governance pipeline for organizing manuscript patch decisions.
claim_items.evidence_requirement: Existing v8.198-v8.207 lineage and zero-counter audits.
claim_items.safe_language: We establish an internally audited, safety-bounded, abstract toy framework for organizing manuscript patch decision governance.

claim_items.blocked_language: The staged lineage means manuscript patches have been applied.
claim_items.boundary_note: Lineage description is allowed only as artifact history, not execution.
claim_items.claim_boundary: Allowed: the project may describe the recent lineage as proposal, dry-run, gate, plan, checklist, audit, decision ledger, finding register, and consistency audit.
claim_items.safe_language: The pipeline records a staged lineage of proposal, dry-run, structural gate, planning, checklist, audit, decision ledger, finding register, and consistency audit artifacts.

claim_items.blocked_language: Zero counters prove the scientific method is correct.
claim_items.boundary_note: Zero counters support safety-boundary claims, not scientific validation.
claim_items.claim_boundary: Allowed: the project may claim that internal counters preserve zero application permission, zero patch application, zero manuscript mutation, and zero readiness approval.
claim_items.evidence_requirement: Zero counters in v8.207 source artifact.
claim_items.safe_language: Internal audit counters preserve zero application permission, zero applied patches, zero manuscript mutation, and zero readiness approval.

claim_items.blocked_language: The claim register authorizes submission or publication.
claim_items.boundary_note: Claim classification is not readiness approval.
claim_items.claim_boundary: Allowed: the project may claim that this artifact separates allowed, deferred, and prohibited manuscript claims.
claim_items.safe_language: The claim boundary register separates currently allowed wording from deferred and prohibited claims.

claim_items.blocked_language: The manuscript has already been patched or finalized.
claim_items.boundary_note: No current artifact applies manuscript patches.
claim_items.claim_boundary: Deferred: any claim that manuscript patches have been applied, integrated, or finalized must wait for an explicit safe patch-application milestone.
claim_items.evidence_requirement: Future safe patch application plus post-application audit.
claim_items.safe_language: Patch application remains future work and is not claimed by the current artifact lineage.

claim_items.blocked_language: The framework has been externally validated, formally proved, or citation-completed.
claim_items.boundary_note: These evidence types remain zero in the current lineage.
claim_items.claim_boundary: Deferred: external validation, independent experiment, proof assistant verification, or new citation-supported claims require nonzero evidence-specific milestones.
claim_items.evidence_requirement: Future external validation, independent experiment, proof, or citation milestone.
claim_items.safe_language: External validation, independent experiments, proof assistant verification, and citation integration remain outside the current evidence base.

claim_items.blocked_language: The model works, predicts, generalizes, or outperforms alternatives.
claim_items.boundary_note: Internal consistency is not empirical performance.
claim_items.claim_boundary: Deferred: scientific efficacy, generalizability, performance, or predictive claims require explicit validation beyond internal toy artifact consistency.
claim_items.evidence_requirement: Future non-operational toy evaluation and separately audited claim upgrade.
claim_items.safe_language: The current contribution is a safety-bounded abstract toy governance framework, not a validated predictive or performance model.

claim_items.blocked_language: The framework models real pathogens, real receptors, host targeting, infectivity, immune evasion, or host range.
claim_items.boundary_note: Real-biological operational claims are outside the allowed scope.
claim_items.claim_boundary: Prohibited: real-biological operational claims, real pathogen simulation, real receptor parameter use, host targeting, infectivity optimization, immune evasion, or host-range prediction are not allowed.
claim_items.evidence_requirement: Not applicable inside this safety boundary.
claim_items.safe_language: All artifacts remain synthetic, abstract, unitless, non-operational, and toy-only.

claim_items.blocked_language: The manuscript is ready for submission, accepted-quality, or publication-ready.
claim_items.boundary_note: Current readiness approval and manuscript submission readiness remain zero.
claim_items.claim_boundary: Prohibited: manuscript submission readiness, acceptance likelihood, publication readiness, or approval language is not allowed while readiness approval remains zero.
claim_items.evidence_requirement: Future submission readiness audit with explicit nonzero readiness approval.
claim_items.safe_language: The manuscript is not submission-ready under the current evidence and readiness counters.

non_readiness_disclaimer: This v8.208 artifact registers manuscript claim boundaries only. It does not complete checklist items, execute checklist steps, grant application permission, apply manuscript patches, modify manuscript files, approve readiness, establish submission readiness, validate scientific claims, or add real-biological operational capability.
title: Safe Abstract Toy Manuscript Claim Boundary Register
